title: The Iconic Update
description: Every item, trade good, and station service now has a pixel icon, generated with Pixellab AI.
changes: 84 pixel-art item icons generated with Pixellab AI, covering all trade goods, minerals, consumables, and equipment.
Colored slot borders identify item type at a glance — yellow for minerals, green for consumables, cyan for equipment, orange for trade goods, and purple for mission materials.
Station services and fuel supplies have their own dedicated icons.
Item slots are larger across all shop and inventory views.

title: The Habitat Update
description: A new walkable shuttle habitat gives you a real home between contracts.
changes: Walk around your glass habitat interior.
Care for a second ship passenger with food, litter, and status meters.
Decorate your habitat with posters from your achievements.
Buy furniture and cozy cabin props at Fantasia's new cosmetics shop.

title: Pimp My Ride Update
description: Fantasia opens the Pimp My Ride store with new ways to style your shuttle.
changes: Buy shuttle paint jobs, thruster trails, and title flair.
Preview looks before you commit your credits.
Carry your style into the cockpit, cabin, and contracts.

title: Launch Update
description: Asteroid Lander launches with a full solar-system orrery and physics-driven asteroid missions.
changes: Navigate a full planetary orrery with gravity-driven flight.
Land on procedural asteroids and survive the approach.
Perform asteroid science with scans, samples, and discoveries.
Uncover contracts, story threads, and hidden lore across the belt.
